steps.title: Set up slope-intercept form
steps.content: With slope $5$, the line has the form $g(x) = 5x + b$.

steps.title: Compare against the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A ($37x$): wrong slope ($37$, not $5$) and no constant term.
  • Choice B ($37x + 5$): swaps slope and intercept.
  • Choice C ($5a$): not even a function of $x$ — missing the constant.
  • Choice D ($5x + 37$): slope $5$ and $g(2) = 10 + 37 = 47$ checks out.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
